label: Complex threat
description: Defines a threat that can be selected and resolved while generating a complex layout.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: ComplexThreatWorker subclass used to test and resolve this threat.

faction.label: Faction
faction.description: Optional faction definition used by workers that spawn faction-specific threats.

postSpawnPassiveThreatFactor.label: Post-spawn passive threat factor
postSpawnPassiveThreatFactor.description: Multiplier applied to used threat points when the threat resolves passively.

minPoints.label: Minimum points
minPoints.description: Minimum threat-point budget required before the worker can resolve.

spawnInOtherRoomChance.label: Spawn in other room chance
spawnInOtherRoomChance.description: Chance that a triggered threat resolves in another viable room.

allowPassive.label: Allow passive
allowPassive.description: Allows the threat to resolve without an available trigger signal.

fallbackToRoomEnteredTrigger.label: Fallback to room-entered trigger
fallbackToRoomEnteredTrigger.description: Creates a room-entry trigger when no existing thing can provide one.

delayChance.label: Delay chance
delayChance.description: Chance that a non-passive threat waits for a randomly selected delay.

delayTickOptions.label: Delay tick options
delayTickOptions.description: Candidate delay durations in game ticks.

threatFactorOverDelayTicksCurve.label: Threat factor over delay ticks curve
threatFactorOverDelayTicksCurve.description: Maps the chosen delay in ticks to the multiplier applied to the threat-point budget.

signalActionAmbushType.label: Signal action ambush type
signalActionAmbushType.description: Pawn source used by the ambush worker.

spawnAroundComplex.label: Spawn around complex
spawnAroundComplex.description: Makes the ambush worker spawn around the expanded complex bounds.

useDropPods.label: Use drop pods
useDropPods.description: Makes the ambush worker deliver spawned pawns in drop pods.

delay-options-when-delay-enabled.message: Delay tick options are required when delay chance is greater than zero.
